title: Price history
description: Rolling price snapshots per product URL. Persists between runs so the Actor can detect price drops and stock changes on the next scheduled run.

history.title: Product history
history.description: One JSON record per monitored product (keys start with history_). Contains past prices and the last seen stock state.

platform.description: Store identifier (amazon, ebay, newegg, shopify, etc.).

prices.description: Observed prices over time (when Save price history is on).

lastPrice.description: Most recent price from the previous run.

lastInStock.description: Most recent in-stock state from the previous run.

lastScrapedAt.description: ISO timestamp of the last successful scrape.
